title: Adopting GitHub Copilot in your enterprise - GitHub Docs
full_text:
Adopting GitHub Copilot in your enterprise
Adopt the latest GitHub Copilot features without compromising on control and governance.
Getting started
3 Articles
Get approval from internal teams, choose a plan, and enable Copilot for your enterprise.
Resources for getting approval of GitHub Copilot
Choosing your enterprise's plan for GitHub Copilot
Setting up GitHub Copilot for your enterprise
Governance basics
5 Articles
Use GitHub's governance features to stay in control of your codebase and compliance requirements.
Governing Copilot to support developer productivity
GitHub Copilot policies for enterprises and organizations
Maintaining codebase standards in a GitHub Copilot rollout
Reviewing audit logs for GitHub Copilot
Preparing for new features and models
Adopting agents
9 Articles
Roll out agentic features within secure guardrails.
Integrating agentic AI into your enterprise's software development lifecycle
Agent management for enterprises
Building guardrails for GitHub Copilot cloud agent
Enabling GitHub Copilot cloud agent in your enterprise
Giving GitHub Copilot cloud agent access to resources in your organization
Administering Copilot CLI for your enterprise
Using hooks with Copilot CLI for predictable, policy-compliant execution
Enabling GitHub Copilot code review in your enterprise
Monitoring agentic activity in your enterprise
